nasb.text: “When you are invited by someone to a wedding feast, do not take the place of honor, for someone more distinguished than you may have been invited by him,

esv.text: “When you are invited by someone to a wedding feast, do not sit down in a place of honor, lest someone more distinguished than you be invited by him,

cnv.text: “你被邀請參加婚筵的時候，不要自己坐在高位上，恐怕有比你更尊貴的客人也被請來；

ccb.text: “参加婚宴的时候，不要坐在首位，因为或许有更尊贵的宾客来赴宴，

csbs.text: “你被人邀请赴婚宴的时候，不要坐在上座，恐怕有比你更尊贵的人也被邀请，
